title: Vela Studio podcast batch: clean and de-noise three raw interview audio tracks into release-ready enhanced masters + episode cleanup notes
one_line_ask: Inspect three raw interview-podcast audio tracks, run Adobe speech enhancement on each to remove noise and lift dialogue clarity, then deliver the three enhanced masters plus a per-episode cleanup note zipped into one hand-off folder.

assets.name: episode_047_raw.wav

issues: The audio adds 'to,' at the very end of the provided script, which finishes 'What would you say are the most significant shifts you've observed in how people work today compared to,' instead of ending at 'compared' as per the script. This is a minor wording difference at the cutoff point.

qc.transcript: Welcome back to the Future Forward podcast, where we explore the trends and technologies shaping our world. assets.name: episode_048_raw.wav

issues: Audio contains an incomplete sound ('o') at the very end, which is not present in the intended script's cutoff point.

The audio transcript ends with an incomplete word 'o' ('a threat, o') which is not present in the intended script ('a threat,'), indicating either an unscripted continuation that was cut off, or an extraneous sound at the end.
